title: Relay the hidden kitchen item for the office check
task: Prepare the home for a quick office check together. Put the specified kitchen item onto the living room table, place the bottle from the bedroom onto the office table, and leave the office cabinet open when you are done.

agent_0: agent_0 can send at most 1 message total.
agent_0 can send messages only to agent_1.
For the shared task, bottle_4 from bedroom_2 must end on table_16 in office_1.
agent_1: agent_1 can send at most 1 message total.
agent_1 can send messages only to agent_2.
For the shared task, the correct kitchen item is butter_dish_2.
For the shared task, the specified kitchen item must end on table_21 in living_room_1.
agent_2: agent_2 can send at most 1 message total.
agent_2 can send messages only to agent_0.
bottle_4 is on bed_13 in bedroom_2.
butter_dish_2 is on table_27 in kitchen_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem benchmark_coop_k3_kitchen_relay_office_check_108294573_176710113_v2)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    bathroom_1 closet_1 bedroom_1 bedroom_2 living_room_1 office_1 kitchen_1 - room
    bottle_4 butter_dish_2 - object
    bed_13 table_21 table_16 cabinet_30 table_27 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 bathroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 closet_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room bed_13 bedroom_2)
    (is_in_room table_21 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room table_16 office_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_30 office_1)
    (is_in_room table_27 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room bottle_4 bedroom_2)
    (is_on_top bottle_4 bed_13)
    (is_in_room butter_dish_2 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top butter_dish_2 table_27)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top butter_dish_2 table_21)
    (is_on_top bottle_4 table_16)
    (is_open cabinet_30)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (K agent_2 (is_on_top butter_dish_2 table_21))))
  ))
)

agent_0.action: Communicate["Please do the office tasks: get bottle_4 from bedroom_2 onto table_16 in office_1 and leave cabinet_30 open when done. I’ll handle the kitchen item to living room table.", agent_1]
agent_0.observation:
